subcodes.title: Khoekhoegowab: /GÔARON
subcodes.first_line:
## Khoekhoegowab: /GÔARON

Ai, Elotse, ne ≠khari /goâroë Sa /nami di dî ≠ams !nâ gei-geire, î sa ≠hansens di dai-e //îe
subcodes.notes: Theory: Khoekhoegowab travel prayer (section GOARON = Travel) -- "Ai Elotse, keep those on the path of Thy love in safety while they travel..." Likely BH10688 (travel prayer). Challenge: Khoisan click consonants.
